recommendations.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Adventure, Action, Comedy, Family
recommendations.overview: The Turtles and the Shredder battle once again, this time for the last cannister of the ooze that created the Turtles, which Shredder wants to create an army of new mutants. Meanwhile Splinter is coming... to a decision.

recommendations.title: Finding Nemo
recommendations.overview: Nemo, an adventurous young clownfish, is unexpectedly taken from his Great Barrier Reef home to a dentist's office aquarium. It's up to his worrisome father Marlin and a friendly but forgetful fish Dory to bring Nemo home -- meeting vegetarian sharks

recommendations.title: Batman vs Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Adventure, Crime, Comedy, Action
recommendations.overview: Batman, Batgirl, and Robin forge an alliance with the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles to fight against the Turtles' sworn enemy, The Shredder, who has apparently teamed up with Ra's Al Ghul and The League of Assassins.

recommendations.title: Cranston Academy: Monster Zone
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Horror
recommendations.overview: An intelligent 15-year-old high school student is unexpectedly transferred to a boarding school where he opens a portal of monsters from another dimension.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb The Movie: Across the 2nd Dimension
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, TV Movie, Science Fiction, Adventure, Action
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb get trapped in an alternate dimension where the evil Doofenshmirtz rules the tri-state area. They must find a way back home with the help of their pet platypus named Perry, who they discover is a secret agent.

recommendations.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: The four turtles travel back in time to the days of the legendary and deadly samurai in ancient Japan, where they train to perfect the art of becoming one. The turtles also assist a small village in an uprising.

recommendations.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
recommendations.overview: Struggling to find his place in the world while juggling school and family, Brooklyn teenager Miles Morales is unexpectedly bitten by a radioactive spider and develops unfathomable powers just like the one and only Spider-Man. While wrestling with th
recommendations.director: Rodney Rothman, Peter Ramsey, Bob Persichetti

recommendations.title: The Red Turtle
recommendations.overview: The dialogue-less film follows the major life stages of a castaway on a deserted tropical island populated by turtles, crabs and birds.

recommendations.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Comedy, Family
recommendations.overview: A quartet of humanoid turtles, trained by their mentor in ninjitsu, must learn to work together to face the menace of Shredder and the Foot Clan.

recommendations.title: The Adventures of Buckaroo Banzai Across the 8th Dimension
recommendations.overview: Adventurer/surgeon/rock musician Buckaroo Banzai and his band of men, the Hong Kong Cavaliers, take on evil alien invaders from the 8th dimension.
